tags.name: uui-table-cell
tags.description: Table cell that detects if it has overflow and if so it'll add a title attribute to itself to display full text. Must be a child of uui-table-row

attributes.name: disable-child-interaction
attributes.description: Used to enforce selection interaction by preventing other interactions, primary set by table-row for select-only mode.

attributes.name: no-padding
attributes.description: Remove padding in order to have element going to the edge of the cell.

properties.name: disableChildInteraction
properties.description: Used to enforce selection interaction by preventing other interactions, primary set by table-row for select-only mode.

properties.name: noPadding
properties.description: Remove padding in order to have element going to the edge of the cell.

tags.name: uui-table-column
tags.description: Table column element. Equivalent of native col. Any styles you apply to it will be applied to the corresponding column in the table. Must be a child of uui-table. If you want to have unstyled column between two styled columns put this element into the markup without any styles applied to it.

tags.name: uui-table-head-cell
tags.description: Child element of uui-table-head. Use it there.

attributes.name: disable-child-interaction
attributes.description: Used to enforce selection interaction by preventing other interactions, primary set by table-row for select-only mode.

attributes.name: no-padding
attributes.description: Remove padding in order to have element going to the edge of the cell.

properties.name: disableChildInteraction
properties.description: Used to enforce selection interaction by preventing other interactions, primary set by table-row for select-only mode.

properties.name: noPadding
properties.description: Remove padding in order to have element going to the edge of the cell.

tags.name: uui-table-head
tags.description: Table head element. Holds the styles for table head. Parent to uui-table-head-cell.

tags.name: uui-table-row
tags.description: Table row element with option to set is as selectable. Parent for uui-table-cell. Must be a child of uui-table.

attributes.name: select-only
attributes.description: Enforce selection interaction and prevent all other interactions, set this when the UI is turned into Selection-Mode.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Enable the ability to select this element.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Attribute applied when the element is selected.

properties.name: selectOnly
properties.description: Enforce selection interaction and prevent all other interactions, set this when the UI is turned into Selection-Mode.

properties.name: selectable
properties.description: Enable the ability to select this element.

properties.name: selected
properties.description: Attribute applied when the element is selected.

events.name: selected
events.description: fires when the media card is selected

events.name: deselected
events.description: fires when the media card is deselected

slots.description: for <uui-table-cell> elements that should be in the row.

cssProperties.name: --uui-table-row-color-selected
cssProperties.description: overwrite the color of the selected row

tags.name: uui-table
tags.description: Recreation of native table and it's child elements. `<uui-table>` is a parent element to `<uui-table-head>` `<and uui-table-row>`. To make it fully accessible remember to add aria-label and aria-describedby.

slots.description: slot for `<uui-table-head>` and `<uui-table-row>` elements. Make a table out of them.
